pattern: Use a stack: push letters normally; when a digit is seen, pop the last letter and skip the digit — both are erased.
hints: A digit always pairs with the non-digit character immediately to its left; think of a stack where letters are pushed and digits cause a pop.
Scan left to right: push every letter; when a digit appears, pop the top of the stack (the guaranteed-to-exist letter to its left) and discard the digit.
After processing all characters, the remaining stack characters form the result in order.

edge_inputs.description: single letter followed by single digit
digit at end removes last letter
multiple consecutive digits each pop one letter
letters remain after all digits consumed

stress.description: random valid string where every digit has a letter to its left
